{{Quote|Maybe he saw the ghost Jedi.|[[Koyi Komad]], about [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] possibly seeing the ghost of Taj Junak|<ref name="RO6">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]]</ref>}}
'''Taj Junak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and a [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble]] of the [[Tapani]] [[House Pelagia|Pelagian]] bloodline. Serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the final years of both institutions, Junak survived the early years of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], taking refuge within the [[Freeworlds Territory]] under the guise of [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] '''Shellery Kint'''. After years of hiding, Junak was eventually discovered by Imperial agents and executed.

==Biography==
[[File:Shellery_Kint.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Taj Junak as professor Shellery Kint]]
Heir of the royal bloodline of [[House Pelagia]], Taj Junak was given to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during his infancy like so many of his ancestors before him. Studying at the [[Jedi academy|academy]] within the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Junak eventually attained the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] after completing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] under the guidance of his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Surviving the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Junak was active at the time that the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], an order which deemed all Jedi traitors and demanded their execution. Junak escaped execution and fled to the [[Freeworlds Territory]] deep within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Under the guise of a philosophy [[Professor/Legends|professor]], [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] "Shellery Kint," Junak applied for and achieved a teaching position at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] while the Galactic Empire took control of the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="LOTE" />

Unable to reveal his identity as a Jedi, Junak worked subtly to sabotage the Empire, hacking into Imperial databases and erasing data from research centers located across nearby space. As the Empire's presence in the sector grew, Junak's secret identity became more threatened. When an uprising at the school threatened the institute's very existence, Junak engaged the Imperial forces in hopes that they would leave the academy and allow its students to live. Seized by members of the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]] in one of the academy's common areas, Junak was tied down and [[Death/Legends|burned alive]] by the agents of the Empire.<ref name="LOTE" />

===Legacy===
[[File:Taj_Junak_death.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The memorial to Junak]]
While the academy was permitted to remain open, the spot on which Junak died remained fallow and barren, and was later walled off in honor of the Jedi hero. Rumor among the students at the school claimed that Junak's spirit lingered on, roaming the academy grounds as a [[Force ghost/Legends|phantom]], watching over all who entered the halls of learning. Rumors of the "Ghost Jedi" later inspired a popular music band of [[Ghost Jedi|the same name]].<ref name="LOTE" />

==Powers and abilities==
Taj Junak was proficient in the use of the Force to engage in [[Projective Telepathy|projective]] and [[Receptive Telepathy|receptive]] [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]], to [[Control Pain|control his own]] and [[Control Another's Pain|another's pain]], [[Concentration|concentrate]], [[Mind trick/Legends|affect the minds]] of others, [[Telekinesis/Legends|move]] objects, to [[Tutaminis|drain energy]], [[Enhance Attribute|strengthen]] himself and [[Short-term memory enhancement|enhance]] his memory. He also could use [[Precognition/Legends|precognition]], [[Life Detection|detect]] and [[Life Sense|sense]] life, [[Magnify Senses|magnify his own senses]] and [[Dim Other's Senses|dim senses of others]].<ref name="LOTE" />

He was also familiar with the [[Force power/Legends|powers]] [[Dopplegänger]], [[Force harmony]], [[Reduce Injury]], [[Remain Conscious]], [[Resist Stun]], [[Force sight]], [[Farsight/Legends|Farsight]], [[Accelerate Healing]], [[Detoxify Poison]], [[Meditation of Emptiness|Emptiness]], [[Sense Force|See Force]], [[Force barrier/Legends|Lesser Force Shield]] and [[Hibernation trance/Legends|Hibernation trance]]. In addition, Junak was capable in the art of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]].<ref name="LOTE" />
